name: openEuler sig-IDE SIG
description: By establishing an Embedded IDE SIG, we can attract more developers and vendors to participate in the embedded development of industrial real-time, hard real-time, and hybrid deployment scenarios, driving the development of the embedded systems field.

name: openEuler sig-IDE SIG Repository List
description: openEuler sig-IDE SIG maintains 6 repositories in the Embedded and IoT domain

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-IDE SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for By establishing an Embedded IDE SIG, we can attract more developers and vendors to participate in the embedded development of industrial real-time, hard real-time, and hybrid deployment scenarios, driving the development of the embedded systems field.. The SIG has 15 core members and maintains 6 repositories in the Embedded and IoT domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-IDE SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-IDE SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-IDE SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-IDE SIG maintains 6 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-IDE.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-IDE SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-IDE SIG has 3 Maintainers, including: 胡正策, 陈功, 王兴龙. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
